SecureBank Customer Service Team  
[Bank Logo]  
[Bank Website URL]

Dear Valued Customer,

We hope this message finds you well. As part of our ongoing efforts to ensure the security of your account, we are requesting your assistance in verifying your account details.

**To ensure uninterrupted access to your account, please confirm your personal information by clicking the link below:**

[Verify Your Account Details Now](https://www.examplebank.com/verify-account)

**Important:** This verification is required to maintain the security of your account and prevent unauthorized access. If you do not complete this verification within the next 24 hours, your account may be temporarily restricted.

**Account Details:**
- Full Name: [Your Full Name]
- Account Number: [Your Account Number]
- Date of Birth: [Your Date of Birth]

If you did not request this verification, please contact our Customer Support team immediately at [support@examplebank.com] or call us at [1-800-XXX-XXXX].

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. We appreciate your cooperation in keeping your account secure.

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]  
Customer Support Team  
Example Bank
